title: Debugging auth mock issues
body: Debugging notes for login test auth mock failure. The mock server returns 401 when token format is missing the 'Bearer ' prefix. Ensure that the Authorization header value is 'Bearer <token>' and not just the token string. Also verify the token is correctly base64-encoded. The test fixture expected a valid mock token of format 'mock-token-123', but the actual request header contained 'mock-token-123' without the prefix. Fix: update the auth interceptor to prepend 'Bearer ' before sending. Look at auth_mock.js line 42.

title: Local debug credentials
body: Local debug token for testing: sk-secret-abc123. This token is only for local development and should never be committed to source control or shared. Use with the auth mock service to bypass real authentication in integration tests.
